name: 15qt Storage Bin with Latches - Brightroom™
description:
Step up to the Brightroom™ 15 Quart Clear Latching Storage Bin with Lid and get organized! The clear base and lid allow you to easily view and locate stored contents from any angle. Color-accented latches securely attach the lid to the base, keeping items contained while providing a comfortable grip for easy carrying. The recessed lid design allows storage bins to stack neatly, maximizing vertical storage space. This plastic storage container is perfect for crafts, shoes, health/beauty essentials, and more, helping bring order to closets, bedrooms, and dorm rooms with ease.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
